title: Ultra Sweet Spanish Rice Paella
description: A fragrant, sweet and spicy paella made in a pressure cooker, perfect for meal prep.
instructions: Preheat the pressure cooker on sauté mode and heat olive oil until shimmering.
Add diced chicken cubes and brown them on all sides, then remove and set aside.
In the same pot, sauté chopped red onion until translucent, then stir in smoked paprika and sliced Thai bird chili.
Return the chicken to the pot, add rice, and stir to coat grains with oil and spices.
Pour in the chicken broth, pineapple, honey, saffron infusion, salt, and pepper; stir gently.
Seal the pressure cooker and cook on high pressure for 10 minutes.
Allow natural pressure release for 5 minutes, then quick release remaining pressure.
Fluff the rice with a fork, transfer to a serving dish, and serve hot; leftover can be stored in airtight containers for meal prep.
